title: Egyptian Fennel Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew made with fennel, piquant spices, and tender meat. Traditionally cooked in a clay pot with a conical lid, this tagine is a hearty and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Piquant spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the fennel and cook until starting to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the piquant spice blend, Egyptian spices, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
